overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city street at night, featuring neon-lit buildings, digital billboards, and pedestrians. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, transitioning from an open intersection with a distinctive orange vehicle to a covered waterfront walkway under an overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with neon signage

events.description: large orange cyberpunk SUV drives past from left to right and exits frame
crossing the street and approaching the covered overpass entrance

agents.ego_description: walking across the zebra crossing toward the neon-lit building entrance

notable_agents.action: orange cyberpunk SUV driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: futuristic orange SUV with boxy design and illuminated accents
large digital billboard displaying 'YOU CAN TRUST' with vehicle advertisement
building entrance with cyan neon trim and red interior lighting
tall street light with multiple fixtures and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection at night, featuring a prominent orange cyberpunk SUV in the foreground. The camera walks forward across the zebra crossing as the vehicle drives past and exits the frame. A large billboard reading 'YOU CAN TRUST' dominates the building facade ahead, while neon lights illuminate the entrance to the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: enters the covered walkway beneath the overpass structure
passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure forming a covered walkway
building facade with warm yellow linear neon lighting and orange accents
large cylindrical support pillars with red-brown tiling and spherical decorations

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. The environment shifts to artificial lighting with a distinctive yellow-neon building facade on the left and large cylindrical pillars lining the path. The space feels enclosed and urban, with scattered pedestrians walking in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional walkway under overpass with digital advertising

events.description: digital billboards overhead change content from advertisements to 'WET DREAM' neon text
approaching the end of the covered section with view of open waterfront ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk with vehicles visible on the road to the right

entered.detail: series of large digital screens mounted on the overpass ceiling displaying various advertisements
multi-lane road with futuristic vehicles passing by

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the overpass, the camera passes under large digital billboards displaying changing advertisements including 'WET DREAM' text. The environment transitions from warm yellow lighting to cooler tones as the covered walkway opens up ahead, revealing a view of the waterfront and distant city lights. Vehicles pass by on the road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: exits the covered overpass into the open waterfront area with visible sky
passing by a pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront sidewalk with the city skyline visible ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in casual clothing walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered with colorful graffiti tags and street art
open view of the waterfront with distant mountains and city lights on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into an open waterfront promenade. The sky is now visible with a deep blue night atmosphere. To the left, a concrete wall is covered in graffiti, while the right side opens to a view of the water and distant city lights. The environment feels more expansive and less enclosed than the previous segments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bustling neon-lit city intersection into a sheltered urban underpass that eventually opens onto an expansive waterfront promenade. It begins by crossing a zebra crossing as a prominent orange cyberpunk SUV drives past, moving toward a building facade dominated by a large billboard reading YOU CAN TRUST. As the camera enters a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, the environment shifts to an enclosed space defined by yellow-neon facades, cylindrical pillars, and passing pedestrians. The scene then transitions through cooler lighting and under digital billboards displaying WET DREAM text before the walkway opens up to reveal the water and distant city lights. Finally, the camera emerges into the open night air of the promenade, moving past a graffiti-covered concrete wall toward a wide view of the harbor under a deep blue sky.
